tasks.title: Inspect Existing Project Structure and UI Code
tasks.description: Analyze the current IELTS Journey project structure including routes, pages, layouts, theme/styling approach, reusable components, dashboard, study plan, vocabulary, AI tutor, progress, and settings code. Identify hard-coded UI values and stale or duplicated UI components. Document findings and prepare a short implementation plan for redesign.
acceptanceCriteria: Project structure and routes are fully mapped
Existing theme/styling approach is identified
Reusable components and their usage are documented
Hard-coded UI values and stale components are listed
Short implementation plan is produced
tasks.expectedResult: A documented analysis of the existing codebase and a short implementation plan for the redesign phases.

outputPlan.description: Inspection report documenting project structure, UI code, and redesign plan

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides foundational understanding and plan for the redesign implementation.

tasks.title: Implement or Improve Theme and Design Token System
tasks.description: Create or enhance the centralized theme and design token system including color tokens, surface tokens, text tokens, border tokens, skill color tokens, AI Tutor color tokens, status tokens, spacing scale, border radius scale, shadow tokens, typography scale, breakpoints, animation tokens, and support for light and dark modes. Refactor existing components to use these tokens instead of hard-coded values.
acceptanceCriteria: Theme tokens cover all required categories
Existing UI components use theme tokens instead of hard-coded styles
Light and dark mode support is verified
No visual regressions in existing UI
tasks.expectedResult: A robust, centralized theme token system integrated into the project with all UI components using semantic tokens.

outputPlan.description: Add and update theme tokens for colors, spacing, typography, shadows, and animations
Add CSS custom properties for theme tokens
Extend Tailwind theme with new tokens
Refactor UI components to use theme tokens

metadata.inputContext: Inspection report on existing theme and styling
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Establishes a consistent design foundation for the entire redesign.

tasks.title: Refine Existing Reusable UI Components per Redesign Specs
tasks.description: Refine and enhance existing reusable UI components such as Button, Card, Badge, Modal, Drawer, Toast, ProgressBar, ProgressRing, SkillCard, StudyTaskCard, VocabularyWordCard, AITutorMessageCard, MobileBottomNavigation, LoadingSkeleton, EmptyState, and ErrorDisplay. Add new variants, improve accessibility, and ensure consistency with the new theme tokens and design guidelines.
acceptanceCriteria: All specified components have new variants and improvements
Components use theme tokens exclusively
Accessibility improvements are verified
No regressions in existing pages using these components
tasks.expectedResult: Reusable UI components are polished, consistent, accessible, and ready for use in redesigned pages.

outputPlan.description: Add AI Tutor variant and theme token usage
Add left-accent border and tint variants
Add grammar and vocabulary skill variants
Add portal rendering and scrollbar compensation
Add drag-to-dismiss, backdrop blur, and focus trap
Add action button, position variants, and SVG icons
Add skill variants and indeterminate mode
Add skill variants and label prop
Add grammar and vocabulary types
Polish status visuals
Add selected state and swipe support
Add typing state, markdown support, and correction variant
Add glass effect and active indicator
Add shimmer direction and new page types
Refine messages and illustrations
Refine error states

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides polished reusable components for consistent UI across redesigned pages.

tasks.title: Create New Reusable UI Components per Redesign Requirements
tasks.description: Develop new reusable UI components that do not exist yet but are required by the redesign, including Select, DatePicker, Tabs, PracticeCard, MistakeCard, ProgressSummaryCard, AITutorRecommendationCard, VocabularyDetailPanel, and SettingsSectionCard. Ensure components follow existing API patterns, use theme tokens, are accessible, and consistent with the design system.
acceptanceCriteria: All new components are implemented as per design specs
Components use theme tokens and are accessible
Components are consistent with existing UI patterns
Components are tested and documented
tasks.expectedResult: New reusable UI components are available for use in page redesigns.

outputPlan.description: Custom Select component with dropdown, search, and keyboard support
DatePicker component for selecting dates
Tabs component for tabbed navigation
PracticeCard component for practice tasks
MistakeCard component for mistake review
ProgressSummaryCard component for progress summaries
AITutorRecommendationCard component for AI Tutor suggestions
VocabularyDetailPanel component for vocabulary details
SettingsSectionCard component for settings sections

metadata.inputContext: Refined reusable components and theme tokens
metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides new reusable components required for full redesign pages.

tasks.title: Redesign Global Layout and Navigation Components
tasks.description: Implement the new global layout and navigation system including desktop navigation, mobile navigation, bottom navigation on mobile, header behavior, AI Tutor shortcut, active page states, profile/settings access, and responsive layout. Ensure the user always knows their location, next actions, and how to access AI Tutor and today's study plan.
acceptanceCriteria: New global layout matches redesign specs
Navigation is responsive and accessible
AI Tutor shortcut is integrated and visible
Active page states and profile access are clear
Mobile bottom navigation is implemented
tasks.expectedResult: Global layout and navigation components are redesigned and fully functional across devices.

outputPlan.description: Implement new sidebar with section grouping and updated navigation
Update header with AI Tutor shortcut and profile access
Enhance mobile bottom navigation with glass effect and active indicator

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Provides the redesigned app shell and navigation for consistent user experience.

tasks.title: Redesign Dashboard Page as Main Learning Command Center
tasks.description: Redesign the Dashboard page to become the main learning command center with friendly greeting, target IELTS band, current estimated level, exam countdown, today's learning mission, AI Tutor recommendation, study streak, skill progress cards, vocabulary review reminder, weak skill warning, weekly progress summary, continue learning button, and quick actions. Use reusable components and theme tokens. Add empty, loading, and error states. Ensure mobile responsiveness and accessibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Dashboard UI matches redesign specs
All required dashboard elements are present and functional
Uses reusable components and theme tokens
Empty, loading, and error states are implemented
Mobile layout is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Dashboard page is fully redesigned as a personalized learning homepage with all specified features.

outputPlan.description: Implement redesigned dashboard UI and logic
Update or create dashboard subcomponents as needed

tasks.title: Redesign Full Study Roadmap Page with Visual Journey and AI Tutor Integration

AI Tutor is integrated contextually

Mobile layout is responsive and accessible
tasks.expectedResult: Full Study Roadmap page is redesigned as a motivating, visual journey with AI Tutor support.

Update or create roadmap subcomponents for milestones, timeline, and celebrations

tasks.title: Perform Comprehensive Testing and Validation of Redesigned Website
tasks.description: Test all redesigned pages and components for correct rendering, functionality, responsiveness, accessibility, and theme token usage. Verify no hard-coded colors or spacing remain. Confirm existing user data displays correctly and no main routes are broken. Run lint, type checks, and focused tests. Document any remaining issues and recommended next steps.
acceptanceCriteria: All pages render correctly and are responsive
Accessibility standards are met
Theme tokens are used consistently with no hard-coded styles
Existing user data displays correctly
No main route is broken
Lint, type checks, and tests pass
Test report and issue list are produced
tasks.expectedResult: All redesigned features are verified working correctly with no regressions or accessibility issues.

outputPlan.description: Comprehensive test report and issue list for the redesign

metadata.finalOutputContribution: Validates the quality and completeness of the full website redesign.

tasks.title: Generate Final Redesign Implementation Report
tasks.description: Compile a final report summarizing all files changed, components created, theme tokens added or updated, pages redesigned, UX and mobile improvements made, accessibility improvements, tests performed, any remaining issues, and recommended next steps for the IELTS Journey full website redesign.
acceptanceCriteria: Final report covers all required summary points
Report is clear, concise, and actionable
tasks.expectedResult: A comprehensive final report documenting the full redesign implementation and recommendations.
